item.title: SPATCHCOCK CHICKEN With Calabrian-Garlic Compound Butter рҹҢ¶пёҸ...
item.description:
Full post Embed


SPATCHCOCK CHICKEN With Calabrian-Garlic Compound Butter рҹҢ¶пёҸ Full recipe on my substack! Ingredients -Whole chicken -Salt -Black pepper -Butter -Garlic -Lemon zest -Rosemary -Dried Oregano -Calabrian chili peppers -Extra virgin olive oil -Optional: smoked paprika For the roast: -Carrots -Potatoes -Fennel bulb -Red onion -Lemons -Dry white wine or broth -Salt -Black pepper -Extra virgin olive oil I then made a sauce with the pan drippings + parsley + Calabrian peppers + butter + splash of red wine vinegar
#roastchicken #dinnerrecipes #fall

item.description:
Full post Embed


EMPANADAS рҹҮҰрҹҮ· INGREDIENTS -Onion -Bell pepper -Cumin -Oregano - AjГӯ molido or cayenne -Paprika -Tomato paste -Ground beef -Green olives -Raisins -Hard boiled eggs -Raisins -Salt -Black pepper -Oil, beef tallow, or lard For the dough -AP Flour -Salt -Beef tallow, butter, or lard -Warm water
#empanadas #argentina #cooking

item.title: BUFFALO FRIED CHICKEN SANDWICHрҹҢ¶пёҸрҹҘө Ingredients For the Bu...
item.description:
Full post Embed


BUFFALO FRIED CHICKEN SANDWICHрҹҢ¶пёҸрҹҘө Ingredients For the Buttermilk BrineвҖЁChicken thighsвҖЁButtermilkвҖЁPickle juiceвҖЁHot sauce (homemade or FrankвҖҷs RedHot)вҖЁSaltвҖЁBlack pepperвҖЁGarlic powderвҖЁOnion powderвҖЁPaprikaвҖЁCayenne pepper For Dredging the ChickenвҖЁAll-purpose flourвҖЁCornstarchвҖЁSaltвҖЁBlack pepperвҖЁGarlic powderвҖЁ 1 tsp onion powderвҖЁ 1 tsp smoked paprikaвҖЁ ВҪ tsp cayenne pepper For the Buffalo Sauce Cayenne peppersвҖЁFresno chiles Habanero peppers (adjust to heat preference) Thai chiles if you want it very spicyвҖЁGarlic clovesвҖЁWhite vinegarвҖЁSaltвҖЁUnsalted butter Worcestershire sauce For the Cabbage & Celery SlawвҖЁGreen cabbageвҖЁCeleryвҖЁFresh lemon juiceвҖЁDijon mustardвҖЁHoneyвҖЁSaltвҖЁBlack pepper Dash of evoo (optional)вҖЁ For the Blue Cheese RanchвҖЁMayonnaise Sour cream Buttermilk Lemon juice Garlic clove or powder Chives Parsley Dill Blue cheese (finely grated or crumbled) Worcestershire sauce Salt Black pepper For Serving 4 brioche buns Butter for toasting buns Pickles Enjoy!
#buffalochicken #friedchicken #cooking #gameday #tailgate

item.title: Tiramisu рҹҚ«вҳ•пёҸ Ingredients For the Ladyfingers (Savoiardi)...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Tiramisu рҹҚ«вҳ•пёҸ Ingredients For the Ladyfingers (Savoiardi): Eggs вҖЁGranulated sugar вҖЁAP FlourвҖЁPowdered sugar (for dusting) Vanilla extract For the Espresso Soak/Mix: Fresh espresso вҖЁSugar NutmegвҖЁMarsala wine or dark rum (optional) For the filling: Egg yolksвҖЁGranulated sugarвҖЁMascarpone cheese вҖЁHeavy cream For finishing: Unsweetened cocoa powderвҖЁ
#tiramisu #dessert #baking #recipe #autumn

item.title: CHICKEN PARM SANDWICH рҹҘ– Ingredients For the chicken cutlets:в...
item.description:
Full post Embed


CHICKEN PARM SANDWICH рҹҘ– Ingredients For the chicken cutlets:вҖЁ2 boneless and skinless chicken breastsВ В  Kosher saltВ В  Freshly ground black pepperВ В  ВҪ cup all-purpose flourВ В  2 eggsВ В  ВҪ cup panko breadcrumbs + ВҪ cup Italian finely ground breadcrumbsВ В  в…“ cup finely grated ParmesanВ В  A few good glugs of olive oil and/or neutral oil for fryingВ В  в…“ cup potato starchВ В  ВҪ tablespoon garlic powderВ В  ВҪ tablespoon onion powderВ В  ВҪ tbs dried thyme For the tomato sauce: 3-4 tablespoons of olive oilвҖЁ2 garlic cloves, smashedвҖЁ1 (28 oz) can San Marzano tomatoesвҖЁSaltвҖЁFreshly ground black pepperвҖЁOptional: 1вҖ“2 teaspoons Calabrian chili paste or chopped Calabrian chilis For the tomato-garlic confit:вҖЁ1 pint of small tomatoes (such as cherry, grape, campari, datterini, or sun gold)вҖЁ1 head garlicвҖЁВҫ cup olive oilвҖЁKosher salt For the pesto:вҖЁ1 big old bunch of basilвҖЁ2-3 garlic clovesвҖЁВј c pine nuts вҖЁв…“ cup grated Parmigiano ReggianoвҖЁВј cup extra virgin olive oilвҖЁSaltВ  For the sandwich assembly:вҖЁBread of choiceвҖЁFresh mozzarellaвҖЁExtra Parmesan for topping Full recipe can be found on my substack, link in bio!
#chickenparm #sandwich #cooking

item.title: LAHMACUN Full recipe is on my substack link in bio! Ingredient...
item.description:
Full post Embed


LAHMACUN Full recipe is on my substack link in bio! Ingredients For the dough: All-purpose flour Salt Sugar Instant yeast Warm water Olive oil (optional) For the topping: Ground lamb or beef (or a combination of the two) Onion Garlic Tomato Red bell pepper or Turkish sweet pepper Flat-leaf parsley Tomato paste Red pepper paste (biber salГ§asДұ) Paprika Cumin Aleppo pepper (optional) Salt Black pepper Sumac onion topping: Red onion Tomatoes Fresh parsley Lemon juice
#summer #outdoorcooking #turkish #lahmacun

item.title: ROPA VIEJA рҹҮЁрҹҮә INGREDIENTS For the meat: -Flank or hanger s...
item.description:
Full post Embed


ROPA VIEJA рҹҮЁрҹҮә INGREDIENTS For the meat: -Flank or hanger steak -Red and green bell peppers -Onion -Tomato paste -Canned diced tomatoes -Salt -Black pepper -Cumin -Oregano -Smoked paprika -Dry white wine -Green olives (+ a little brine) -Cilantro -Bay leaf -Beef or vegetable stock вҖЁFor the black beans: -Black beans -Onion -Green bell pepper -Garlic -Salt -Cumin -Oregano -Bay leaf -Red wine vinegar For the plantains: -Fresh plantains -Neutral frying oil (I used avocado) -Salt (optional) For the rice: -Jasmine Rice -Salt -Onion -Red bell pepper *For the rice, I add a few large pieces of onion and bell pepper to infuse the flavor and then remove after cooking
#ropavieja #cubanfood #cooking #summer
